name: Dr. Amit Chandra
role: Senior Policy Analyst, Center for Civil Society
quote: SvaBharat is the intellectual breath of fresh air we need in policy circles. Rebuilding from ground realities instead of copying Western models is long overdue.

name: Meera Sen
quote: A brilliant effort to bridge practice and academic rigor. SvaBharat creates spaces for thinkers who care about our own standpoint and self-reliance.

name: Rajesh Kumar
quote: It is exciting to see technology, culture, and design coming together under first principles thinking for Bharat. An invaluable hub for emerging ideas.
